title: My income has many doors
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for opening to income from more than one source.
excerpt: A short energy statement from Day 31 of the MONEY program. The release names the single-stream pattern; the allow opens room for income from multiple directions.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 31 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you feel dependent on a single income route and want to open that picture.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 31 of the MONEY program. One door or many: this statement releases the single-stream dependency and opens room for income from multiple places.
I am ready to release the belief that income can only come from one source. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow income through many doors. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from Day 31 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release/allow structure is the core method of The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
